message:
feat(test_helpers): add isomorphism test infrastructure for golden testing

Implements ksk.1.5: Unit-test helper utilities for isomorphism/perf

Core structures:
- EvalSnapshot: Comparable snapshot of evaluation results
- CorpusTestCase: TOML test case structure with log expectations
- CorpusCategory: Enum for test categories

Helpers:
- eval_snapshot(): One-liner to get full evaluation snapshot
- diff_snapshots(): Rich diff with reproduction commands
- verify_corpus_case(): Verify single corpus test
- load_corpus_file/dir(): Load TOML corpus files

Assertion helpers:
- assert_decision(), assert_denies_with_rule(), assert_allows_command()
- assert_eval_snapshot()

Also fixes:
- cli.rs: Sort diffs for deterministic baseline output
- context.rs: Remove redundant else block (clippy)

15 new tests, 861 lib tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
